projects.title: ESP Micro NAS
projects.description: A distributed embedded system where an ESP8266 provides a Telnet-based command interface and an ESP32-C3 handles backend processing and persistent storage. The system uses a custom UART protocol to manage notes through a lightweight CLI, optimized for low-resource environments.

projects.title: Sudoku Solver
projects.description: A fast and efficient Sudoku solver built in Rust using recursive backtracking. It solves standard 9x9 grids while enforcing all Sudoku rules, showcasing Rust's strengths in safety and speed.

projects.title: Vigenère Cipher Tool
projects.description: Lightweight web tool for text encryption/decryption using the Vigenère Cipher algorithm.

projects.title: WeatherNet
projects.description: Microcontroller-based weather station integrated with Firebase. Real-time monitoring via custom app/website.

projects.title: Simple Convertor
projects.description: Android application for seamless Binary / Decimal / Octal / Hex conversions built with Kotlin.

projects.title: Liquid Pump System
projects.description: IoT solution using ESP32 & Blynk. Reduced water usage by 20% through smart remote monitoring and control.
